name: loombrain-projects
description: Guided workflows for LoomBrain projects, vision, goals, and tasks — kickoff, backfill, status briefing, weekly review, session retro

lb:project-status.description: Surface vision, goals, and active tasks for the current project as a visible briefing

lb:project-backfill.description: Walk an existing PARA project through a gap-fill interview — vision, goals, tasks added only where missing

lb:project-kickoff.description: Bootstrap a new PARA project with vision link, goals, and initial tasks in one guided flow

lb:weekly-review.description: Guided task triage — pending-review, overdue, stale, plus goal-without-tasks audit

lb:session-retro.description: End-of-session distill — extract completed tasks, new tasks, goal progress from the work just done
